creator: clsung@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Nov 02, 2006 at 09:04:46AM +0100, Anatoliy Dmytriyev wrote:
 > Dear Sirs,
 > 
 > On Nov 01 06:00:00 UTC 2006 I got email (as maintainer) about patch for 
 > one of my ports http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104993
 > with the message "Awaiting maintainers feedback".
 > And  in 31 minutes (Nov 1 06:31:47 UTC 2006 )  the patch accepted 
 > without any actions from my side.
 > I now that it was just small changes but if you need any feedback from a 
 > maintainer you should, I think, wait more than 31 minutes.
 > 
 > 
 > Best regards,
 > Anatoliy Dmytriyev
 
 Hi, 
     That is responsible change (that means who the committer will take
     care of it, "freebsd-ports-bugs->clsung")
 
     And we are still waiting your approval ( or disapproval).
 
 Regards,
 -- 
 Cheng-Lung Sung - clsung@
